title: Napoleonic Datapack (WarOfBlackPowder)
description:
This datapack gives you the world-wide weapons used in napoleon era for minecraft.
Not only weapons but this datapack also gives headwears, tools, musical instruments, flags, artilleries...
body:
This datapack gives you the world-wide weapons used in Napoleon era for Minecraft. Not only weapons but this datapack also gives headwears, tools, musical instruments, flags, artilleries...

Thanks to captain_astrid,scarecrow01 for the resource pack

Thanks to PlasticScot for the video

Especially thanks to Killerbee47 for the tons of bugs report and support me in my work

Visit PlanetMC page of this project

How to use weapons, tools: Napoleonic Minecraft Datapack V1.5 - YouTube

Weapons & Tools recipes: https://youtu.be/Dx2ZBAc2d2w

Weapons and Tools Recipe Extra Datapack

How to use artilleries: (131) Foot Artillery Test (Napoleonic Datapack) - YouTube

SAD NEWS: MINECRAFT VERSION 1.18 OR BELOW IS NO LONGER SUPPORT

To configure datapack gameplay, you have to add the "host" tag to your datapack by using this command: "/tag @p add host." Then you can configure the gameplay by using this command: "/function n_lib:settings."

Weapons, Tools, Flags, Musical Instruments, Artilleries, Headgears Information:

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1XIThE4qbIYYL10xZaKdEO7nwcj0G4xyWuSO-6AjWw_g/edit?usp=sharing

Want weaponsmith and toolsmith villagers to sell Napoleonic Datapack Items?

Bugle Musics:

+ British Light Infantry

+ La Marche

+ Fehrbelliner Reitermarsch

+ Pohod Artilleriya

+ Strauch Marsch

Fife & Drum Musics:

+ La Grenadiere

+ Yorkscher Marsch

+ British Grenadiers

+ Aux Champs

+ Pohod Grenaderskiy

+ The Girl I Left Behind

+ Osterreichischer Grenadiermarsch

+ Yankee Doodle (Fife only)

+ Alturas - Inti Illimani (Fife only)

+ Outroduction of Legend - Red cliff (Fife only)

Commands to get items:

/function n_lib:give_item/flintlock_pistol (Flintlock Pistol)

/function n_lib:give_item/musket (Musket)

/function n_lib:give_item/rifled_musket (Rifled Musket)

/function n_lib:give_item/arquebus (Arquebus)

/function n_lib:give_item/sabre (Sabre)

/function n_lib:give_item/lance (Lance)

/function n_lib:give_item/foot_pike (Foot Pike)

/function n_lib:give_item/bugle (Bugle)

/function n_lib:give_item/fife (Fife)

/function n_lib:give_item/bugle (Drum)

/function n_lib:give_item/flags/{name of a flag} (Nation Flag)

/function n_lib:give_item/ram (Ram Rod)

/function n_lib:give_item/32_round_shot (32 Round Shot)

/function n_lib:give_item/headgear/...

/function n_lib:give_item/artilleries/...
